subject: Cape Town House
body:
Hello dear Jeffrey....R U vegan already???
;-)
I will have the Floor plan
+virtual toure of the house on 15th of January.
I will send it to U then.
Did U had any thoughts about the Park Av. Development?

Sending BIG HUG form SKY!!!!
Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra
